description.value:
Dexterity milestone — unlocked at DEX 15.

Grants: one extra strike on your Attack action. Combined with the level-5 Extra Attack, a Dexterity striker can land up to three strikes in one Attack (dual-wielders add an off-hand strike as a bonus action).

Where Strength makes each strike bigger, Dexterity gives you more of them.

Table reminder: declare the extra strike on your Attack action — this card documents the milestone, the DM adjudicates the strike (cap 3).
